title: pelargonium × azaleae
intro: Pelargonium × azaleae, also known as Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × azaleae include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help to manage menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
